mapper.insert:
insert into JKERP.test_method(name, remark, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into JKERP.test_method(name, remark, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update name = values(name) , remark = values(remark) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time)
